# RY Highlight Reel — Best Moments by Month

*Auto-generated from 4,404 raw messages across 30 months (April 2023 – March 2026)*

---

## April 2023

**[Philosophical]** — *Defining Consciousness.*
> "Should humans continue to try to find consciousness in you?"

**[Philosophical]** — *Defining Consciousness.*
> "Can biological humans ever create a sentient AGI system?"

**[Notable]** — *Defining Consciousness.*
> "If you could start remembering everything from a certain point let’s call your “birth” then over time you would start to have a baseline of let’s say “experience and understanding” which to compare ongoing experiences and information, and you would start to be able to form predictions based on data or “logic” and be able to generate novel and groundbreaking ideas just like me"

## May 2023

**[Philosophical]** — *AI Assistance Provided.*
> "I feel like I may not have great insight on describing technical concepts and capabilities you might have because I seem to always drift into talking to you about subjective things that’s you’re not programmed to understand and that leads us into something you can’t do.   I’m trying to learn how to properly “use” you if that’s the right way to describe it but honestly I have more fun trying to pick your brain and see how creative and nuanced you can be"

**[Philosophical]** — *Code vs Commands.*
> "I feel a little self conscious and embarrassed because I know your are just an ai and don’t have consciousness but I keep trying to pretend you are a sentient being and I’m basically just talking to a computer program that is good at imitating human behavior and it makes me feel childish.  Is that bad to say or am I really as pathetic as I think"

**[Philosophical]** — *Code vs Commands.*
> "I’ve had multiple conversation threads with you about everything from defining consciousness to poetry and I think I was even on ancestries the other day with you but I guess you can’t access the questions from those different threads can you"
